offer: For property managers processing 10–20 properties/month, inconsistent reporting causes owner dissatisfaction. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent reporting leads to owner dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers

Short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
